title: Pretty Pipes: Fluids
description: Pretty Pipes Addon which adds fluid pipes to transfer your fluids!
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/pbwFQzD.png)

# Pretty Pipes: Fluids

Pretty Pipes: Fluids is an addon to [Pretty Pipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/pretty-pipes/) which adds a new pipe which allows extraction and transport of fluid within the Pretty Pipes network.

The fluid pipes connect to any blocks capable to handle fluids, and inserting a fluid extraction module will automatically extract fluid from the block and try to insert it into other fluid handling blocks.

## Features
### Fluid Pipe
Attaches a fluid container to the network. Fluid pipes can be hooked into existing Item Networks from Pretty Pipes, as shown above.

### Fluid Extraction Modules
Extracts fluids from a container into the network.

### Fluid Retrieval Modules
Requests fluids from the network into attached container.

### Fluid Filter Modules
Allows filtering of fluids for certain modules.

### Fluid Limiter Module
Limits the amount of fluid that can exist in the adjacent tank.
Limits can be set as Buckets (B) or Millibuckets (mB)


## Existing Modules
Pretty Pipes: Fluids also uses some modules from Pretty Pipes.

### Speed Modules
Increases the transfer speed of the fluid in the pipe

### Priority Modules
Increases or Decreases the priority of the attached container.
